title: Uni Cafes – Campus Dining
description: Delicious campus flavors at your fingertips. Discover the best campus flavors from quick bites to healthy delights, bringing the best cafes directly to your fingertips.

title: SupplySetu - Streamlining Ecosystems
description: The smartest way to connect vendors and suppliers. Discover reliable partners, manage your inventory efficiently, and grow your business.

title: Smart Attendance - NFC Tap Station
description: A smart attendance system allowing students to tap their NFC ID cards to mark attendance automatically. Includes a dashboard, real-time simulation panel, and robust teacher/student management.
